title: rottboellia stricta
intro: Rottboellia stricta, also known as Katuk or Titi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rottboellia stricta include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional cooking in some Asian cultures.
